channel.title: n8n + Ollama AI Workflow Tutorials
channel.description: Free tutorials for building self-hosted AI automation workflows with n8n and Ollama. No API keys, no cloud costs, full privacy.

item.title: Automate Competitor Monitoring with n8n + Ollama (AI Market Intelligence)
item.description: Build an automated competitor monitoring system with n8n and Ollama. Track pricing changes, feature launches, and content strategies. Daily AI-powered intelligence reports. Replaces $15K-50K/year tools. Free workflow template.

item.title: Automate AI Translation with n8n + Ollama (Self-Hosted Content Localization Workflow)
item.description: Build an automated translation workflow with n8n and Ollama. Translate websites, product listings, emails, and documents into 50+ languages using self-hosted AI. No API costs. Free workflow template included.

item.title: Automate Image Alt Text with n8n + Ollama (AI Accessibility Workflow)
item.description: Generate WCAG-compliant alt text for images at scale using n8n and Ollama. Automate accessibility compliance with local AI. No API costs. Free workflow template.

item.title: Generate AI Product Descriptions with n8n + Ollama (E-Commerce Automation)
item.description: Automate SEO product descriptions for your e-commerce store with n8n and Ollama. Generate unique, keyword-rich listings at scale using local AI. No API costs. Free workflow template.

item.title: Automate Content Moderation with n8n + Ollama (AI Comment Filter)
item.description: Build an automated content moderation pipeline with n8n and Ollama. Filter toxic comments, spam, and inappropriate content using local AI. No API costs, full privacy. Free workflow template.

item.title: Automate Data Enrichment with n8n + Ollama (AI-Powered Web Scraping Pipeline)
item.description: Build an AI-powered data enrichment pipeline with n8n and Ollama. Scrape websites, extract structured company and contact data with local AI, and push enriched leads to Google Sheets or Airtable.

item.title: How to Extract Invoice Data with n8n + Ollama (Free AI Document Processing Workflow)
item.description: Extract invoice data automatically with n8n and Ollama. Pull vendor name, invoice number, line items, totals, and tax using local AI. Free workflow template. GDPR-compliant, no cloud API costs.

item.title: How to Automate Customer Support with n8n + Ollama (Free AI Ticket Router)
item.description: Automate customer support ticket routing with n8n and Ollama. Classify and route tickets into billing, technical, feature request, and spam using local AI. No API costs, full data privacy.

item.title: Automate Code Reviews with n8n + Ollama (AI Pull Request Reviewer)
item.description: Build an automated AI code review pipeline with n8n and Ollama. Review pull requests locally with zero API costs. Free workflow template included. GDPR compliant.

item.title: Automate Resume Screening with n8n + Ollama (AI Recruitment Pipeline)
item.description: Build an AI-powered resume screening pipeline with n8n and Ollama. Score candidates, extract skills, rank applicants. Free workflow template. No API costs, GDPR compliant.

item.title: How to Extract Data from PDFs with n8n + Ollama (Free Workflow)
item.description: Automate PDF data extraction with n8n and Ollama. Parse invoices, contracts, and reports using local AI. Free workflow template included. No API costs, full privacy.

item.title: Automate Sentiment Analysis with n8n + Ollama (Brand Monitoring Pipeline)
item.description: Build an automated sentiment analysis pipeline with n8n and Ollama. Monitor brand mentions, classify feedback, and route alerts. Free workflow template. No API costs.

item.title: Build a Self-Hosted AI Chatbot with n8n + Ollama (No API Keys)
item.description: Build a private AI chatbot with n8n and Ollama. Supports Slack, Telegram, and web chat. Runs 100% locally with zero API costs. Free workflow template included.

item.title: How to Build a Private RAG Knowledge Base with n8n + Ollama (No Cloud APIs)
item.description: Build a fully private RAG knowledge base using n8n, Ollama, and Qdrant. Ingest documents, generate embeddings, and query with local AI. No cloud APIs, no data leaks.

item.title: Automate Email Triage with Local AI: n8n + Ollama Email Classification Workflow
item.description: Build an AI-powered email triage system with n8n and Ollama. Automatically classify emails into support, sales, billing, spam, and urgent categories. Route to Slack channels and auto-draft replies.

item.title: Build an AI Meeting Notes Summarizer with n8n + Ollama (Free Workflow)
item.description: Automatically summarize meeting transcripts with n8n and Ollama. Extract action items, decisions, and follow-ups. Free workflow template. Runs locally, no API costs.

item.title: How to Build AI Lead Scoring with n8n + Ollama (Free Workflow)
item.description: Automate lead scoring with n8n and Ollama. Score leads 1-100 using local AI, enrich with company data, auto-route hot leads. Free workflow template included. No API costs.

item.title: How to Automate Email Responses with n8n and Ollama (Free, Self-Hosted)
item.description: Build a free, self-hosted email auto-responder using n8n and Ollama. Classify, prioritize, and draft replies automatically with local AI. Full tutorial with code examples.

item.title: How to Automate Social Media Content with n8n + Ollama (Free Workflow)
item.description: Generate optimized social media posts for Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, and Instagram using n8n and Ollama. Free workflow template included. No API costs, runs 100% locally.

item.title: n8n + Ollama Tutorial: Automate Everything with Local AI (No API Keys)
item.description: Step-by-step tutorial for connecting n8n to Ollama for local AI automation. Generate content, classify emails, score leads, and extract data without any API keys or monthly costs.

item.title: How to Build Self-Hosted AI Workflows with n8n and Ollama (2026 Guide)
item.description: Complete guide to building AI-powered automation workflows using n8n and Ollama. Run local AI models for content generation, email automation, lead scoring, and more. No API keys needed.
